---
name: Infrastructure
about: Track CI, reproducibility, matrix, and reporting work
title: "Infra: <task>"
labels: ["area:ci"]
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the reliability, reproducibility, or reporting gap.

## Expected Behavior

State what should be true after the fix.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Local command is documented
- [ ] CI behavior matches the documentation
- [ ] Artifacts or summaries are easy to inspect
- [ ] Report-only failures are clearly distinguished from CI gates
